subcodes.first_line: By the life of God! All have been created for the recognition of God, exalted be His glory, and the exaltation of His Word, and likewise for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لعمر الله کل از برای عرفان حق جل جلاله و اعلاء کلمه خلق شده اند و همچنین از
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
